summary: Iteration 186: Tested 4 Gap Closers feature - All backend tests (9/9) passed. Frontend Gap Closer section renders correctly on /ai-learning with all 4 gap cards and refresh button working.
critical_code_review_comments: Gap closer service imports correctly with all functions: get_confidence_band_accuracy, apply_confidence_awareness, find_po_with_intelligence, find_customer_from_vendor_history, find_sales_order_from_flow, enhance_po_candidates, get_customer_suggestion
Gap 1 integration in document_readiness_service.py correctly routes low-accuracy confidence bands to review
Gap 2-4 integrations in bc_validation_service.py correctly expand PO candidates, suggest customers, and cross-reference document flow

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Gap Closer section renders with all 4 gap cards, refresh button works)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gap Closers are on the AI Learning page (/ai-learning). Scroll down to see the 'Validation Gap Closers' section. In preview environment: 95-100% band has 103 samples with 19% accuracy and triggers_review=true. PO, customer, and SO intelligence show 0s because there's no BC connection in preview. The gap closers are ACTIVE and fire on every document during validation.

frontend_components: Gap 1 Confidence card (data-testid='gap-1-confidence') - PASS (shows 5 bands with accuracy and triggers_review)
Gap 2 PO card (data-testid='gap-2-po') - PASS (shows vendors_with_po_patterns and flow_events)
Gap 4 Sales Order card (data-testid='gap-4-sales-order') - PASS (shows flow_events and so_matches)
